scripts.build: npm run setup-typst && npm run typst && astro build
scripts.setup-typst: powershell -Command "if (!(Get-Command typst -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://github.com/typst/typst/releases/latest/download/typst-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip' -OutFile typst.zip; Expand-Archive typst.zip .; Move-Item typst-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc/typst.exe .; Remove-Item typst.zip, typst-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -Recurse }"
scripts.typst: mkdir -p public && typst compile src/typst/sample.typ public/sample.svg
